bpaFixes.ruleName: Column references should be fully qualified
bpaFixes.llmFixSuggestion: Update the 'Fact Invoices[Invoice_state_group_details]' column to use a fully qualified reference, such as 'Fact Invoices'[Invoice_state_group_details], in all DAX expressions.

bpaFixes.ruleName: Do not use floating point data types
bpaFixes.llmFixSuggestion: Change the data type of the 'Fact Sales[delivery_production_times]' column to a fixed decimal number type, such as Decimal Number, to avoid potential issues with floating point precision.

inspectorFixes.llmFixSuggestion: Review and update the local report settings to match the expected values, specifically 'exportDataMode' should be set to 'AllowSummarizedAndUnderlying' and other null values should be set to their corresponding expected values.
